proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving treatment_cetuximab have a different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_bevacizumab have a different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_pembrolizumab have a different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_encorafenib have a different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib have a different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.
Patients receiving treatment_regorafenib have a different mean pfs_months than patients not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months 4.29 on treatment_cetuximab (n=15078) vs 4.32 off (n=34922); diff=-0.038 (Welch t-test p=0.088).
Mean pfs_months 4.30 on treatment_bevacizumab (n=22383) vs 4.32 off (n=27617); diff=-0.019 (Welch t-test p=0.354).
Mean pfs_months 4.32 on treatment_pembrolizumab (n=7660) vs 4.31 off (n=42340); diff=0.005 (Welch t-test p=0.856).
Mean pfs_months 4.32 on treatment_encorafenib (n=5111) vs 4.31 off (n=44889); diff=0.005 (Welch t-test p=0.873).
Mean pfs_months 4.27 on treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib (n=4033) vs 4.32 off (n=45967); diff=-0.044 (Welch t-test p=0.244).
Mean pfs_months 5.09 on treatment_regorafenib (n=10022) vs 4.12 off (n=39978); diff=0.972 (Welch t-test p=1.71e-216).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative coefficient in linear regression).
Patients with stage_iv = 1 have shorter mean pfs_months than stage_iv = 0.
Older age_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Sex (sex_female) is associated with pfs_months: females have different mean pfs_months than males.

analyses.result_summary: Per +1 ECOG PS: pfs_months change -1.190 months (p=0).
Stage IV mean pfs=3.703 (n=27481); non-IV mean pfs=5.055 (n=22519); diff=-1.352 (p=0).
Per +1 year age: pfs_months change 0.1765 months (p=0).
Female mean pfs=4.308; male mean pfs=4.314; diff=-0.006 (p=0.77).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher albumin_g_dl is associated with higher pfs_months (continuous predictor in linear regression).
Higher ldh_u_l is associated with lower pfs_months (continuous predictor in linear regression).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with lower pfs_months (continuous predictor in linear regression).
Higher nlr is associated with lower pfs_months (continuous predictor in linear regression).
Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with lower pfs_months (continuous predictor in linear regression).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with lower pfs_months (continuous predictor in linear regression).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with higher pfs_months (continuous predictor in linear regression).

analyses.result_summary: Per +1 unit albumin_g_dl: pfs_months change 0.46536 months (p=3.25e-115).
Per +1 unit ldh_u_l: pfs_months change -0.00032 months (p=0.0126).
Per +1 unit crp_mg_l: pfs_months change -0.00202 months (p=0.065).
Per +1 unit nlr: pfs_months change 0.00522 months (p=0.29).
Per +1 unit cea_ng_ml: pfs_months change -0.00535 months (p=3.13e-17).
Per +1 unit weight_loss_pct_6mo: pfs_months change -0.07302 months (p=2.21e-167).
Per +1 unit hemoglobin_g_dl: pfs_months change -0.01009 months (p=0.0777).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with kras_mutation=1 have different mean pfs_months than kras_mutation=0.
Patients with nras_mutation=1 have different mean pfs_months than nras_mutation=0.
Patients with braf_v600e=1 have different mean pfs_months than braf_v600e=0.
Patients with msi_high=1 have different mean pfs_months than msi_high=0.
Patients with her2_amplified=1 have different mean pfs_months than her2_amplified=0.
Patients with ntrk_fusion=1 have different mean pfs_months than ntrk_fusion=0.
Patients with right_sided_primary=1 have different mean pfs_months than right_sided_primary=0.

analyses.result_summary: kras_mutation=1 mean pfs=4.121 (n=20898); kras_mutation=0 mean pfs=4.448 (n=29102); diff=-0.327 (p=1.86e-58).
nras_mutation=1 mean pfs=4.526 (n=1506); nras_mutation=0 mean pfs=4.305 (n=48494); diff=0.221 (p=0.000731).
msi_high=1 mean pfs=4.293 (n=2513); msi_high=0 mean pfs=4.313 (n=47487); diff=-0.019 (p=0.68).
her2_amplified=1 mean pfs=4.258 (n=1504); her2_amplified=0 mean pfs=4.313 (n=48496); diff=-0.056 (p=0.36).
ntrk_fusion=1 mean pfs=4.351 (n=251); ntrk_fusion=0 mean pfs=4.311 (n=49749); diff=0.040 (p=0.786).
right_sided_primary=1 mean pfs=4.114 (n=17657); right_sided_primary=0 mean pfs=4.419 (n=32343); diff=-0.305 (p=1.04e-49).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among msi_high=1 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab.
Among msi_high=0 patients, treatment_pembrolizumab is NOT associated with longer pfs_months (no benefit in MSS).
There is a significant treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high interaction on pfs_months (positive interaction term).

analyses.code: ttest pfs by pembro within msi_high==1
analyses.result_summary: In MSI-H (n=2513): pembro mean pfs=4.299 (n=396); no-pembro=4.292 (n=2117); diff=0.007 (p=0.957).

analyses.code: ttest pfs by pembro within msi_high==0

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient pembro x MSI-H = 0.002 months (p=0.988).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among kras_mutation=0 (KRAS WT) patients, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than no cetuximab.
Among kras_mutation=1 patients, treatment_cetuximab is NOT associated with longer pfs_months (cetuximab is futile in KRAS-mutated CRC).
There is a negative treatment_cetuximab x kras_mutation interaction on pfs_months (cetuximab benefit is reduced in KRAS-mutated).

analyses.code: ttest pfs by cetux within kras==0
ttest pfs by cetux within kras==1

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient cetux x KRAS = 0.020 months (p=0.665).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among braf_v600e=1 patients, treatment_encorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months than no encorafenib.
Among braf_v600e=0 patients, treatment_encorafenib is NOT associated with longer pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_encorafenib x braf_v600e interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.code: ttest pfs by encor within braf==1
ttest pfs by encor within braf==0

analyses.result_summary: Interaction coefficient encor x BRAF V600E = -0.141 months (p=0.376).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among her2_amplified=1 patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is associated with longer pfs_months.
Among her2_amplified=0 patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is NOT associated with longer pfs_months.
There is a positive treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib x her2_amplified interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.code: ttest pfs by tras_tuc within her2==1
analyses.result_summary: HER2-amp (n=1504): tras_tuc mean pfs=4.273 (n=120); no-tras_tuc=4.256 (n=1384); diff=0.017 (p=0.934).

analyses.code: ttest pfs by tras_tuc within her2==0
analyses.result_summary: HER2 non-amp (n=48496): tras_tuc mean pfs=4.271 (n=3913); no-tras_tuc=4.317 (n=44583); diff=-0.046 (p=0.232).
Interaction coefficient tras_tuc x HER2-amp = 0.063 months (p=0.778).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among right_sided_primary=0 (left-sided) and KRAS WT patients, treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months.
Among right_sided_primary=1 and KRAS WT patients, treatment_cetuximab benefit is reduced or absent.
In KRAS WT patients, there is a negative treatment_cetuximab x right_sided_primary interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: KRAS WT, left-sided (n=18853): cetux mean pfs=4.577 (n=5780); no-cetux=4.642 (n=13073); diff=-0.065 (p=0.109).
KRAS WT, right-sided (n=10249): cetux mean pfs=4.107 (n=3041); no-cetux=4.138 (n=7208); diff=-0.031 (p=0.492).

analyses.code: interaction cetux x right_sided in KRAS WT
analyses.result_summary: Interaction cetux x right-sided in KRAS WT (n=29102) = 0.034 months (p=0.601).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among nras_mutation=1 patients, treatment_cetuximab provides no benefit (similar PFS on/off cetuximab).
There is a negative treatment_cetuximab x nras_mutation interaction on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Interaction cetux x NRAS = -0.007 months (p=0.96).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treatment_bevacizumab is associated with longer pfs_months overall (positive main effect).
In KRAS-mutated patients, treatment_bevacizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no bevacizumab.
There is no significant treatment_bevacizumab x kras_mutation interaction (bev benefit is similar regardless of KRAS).

analyses.code: ttest pfs by bev within kras==1

analyses.result_summary: Interaction bev x KRAS = -0.004 months (p=0.915).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treatment_regorafenib is associated with shorter mean pfs_months overall (since used in heavily pretreated/refractory patients).
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative coefficient).
Among patients with prior_lines_of_therapy >= 2, treatment_regorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months than no regorafenib.

analyses.result_summary: Per +1 prior line: pfs change 0.008 months (p=0.388).

Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories (one-way ANOVA).
Patients with rural_residence=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than rural_residence=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ecog_ps, stage_iv, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, in MSI-H patients, treatment_pembrolizumab still has a positive coefficient on pfs_months.
After adjusting for ecog_ps, stage_iv, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, in BRAF V600E patients, treatment_encorafenib still has a positive coefficient on pfs_months.
After adjusting for ecog_ps, stage_iv, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, in HER2-amp patients, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib still has a positive coefficient on pfs_months.
After adjusting for ecog_ps, stage_iv, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, in KRAS WT patients, treatment_cetuximab still has a positive coefficient on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Adj coef pembro in MSI-H = 0.043 months (p=0.426, n=2513).
Adj coef encorafenib in BRAF V600E = -0.019 months (p=0.447, n=2272).
Adj coef tras_tuc in HER2-amp = 0.005 months (p=0.961, n=1504).
Adj coef cetuximab in KRAS WT = -0.022 months (p=0.177, n=29102).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with ntrk_fusion=1 have different mean pfs_months than ntrk_fusion=0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable model adjusting for clinical/biomarker covariates, treatment_pembrolizumab x msi_high interaction remains positive and significant.
In a multivariable model adjusting for clinical/biomarker covariates, treatment_encorafenib x braf_v600e interaction remains positive and significant.
In a multivariable model adjusting for clinical/biomarker covariates, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib x her2_amplified interaction remains positive and significant.
In a multivariable model adjusting for clinical/biomarker covariates, treatment_cetuximab x kras_mutation interaction is negative (cetux benefit attenuated by KRAS).

analyses.result_summary: Adj interaction pembro x MSI-H = 0.037 (p=0.512).
Adj interaction encor x BRAF V600E = -0.014 (p=0.846).
Adj interaction tras_tuc x HER2-amp = 0.011 (p=0.914).
Adj interaction cetux x KRAS = 0.027 (p=0.175).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher smoking_pack_years is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher bmi is associated with longer pfs_months (obesity paradox or no effect).
Patients with prior_immunotherapy=1 have different mean pfs_months than =0.
Patients with prior_targeted_therapy=1 have different mean pfs_months than =0.

analyses.result_summary: Per +1 pack-year: pfs change 0.00005 (p=0.913).
Per +1 BMI: pfs change -0.0029 (p=0.164).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among braf_v600e=1 patients, the combination of treatment_encorafenib AND treatment_cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months than encorafenib alone (BEACON-style synergy).
In BRAF V600E patients, the encorafenib x cetuximab interaction term is positive on pfs_months.
Among MSI-H patients, treatment_pembrolizumab provides a larger PFS benefit in stage_iv=0 patients than stage_iv=1 patients (interaction).

analyses.code: ttest combo vs enc-only in BRAF V600E
analyses.result_summary: BRAF V600E: combo (encor+cetux, n=58) mean pfs=4.151; enc-only (n=184)=3.925; diff=0.226 (p=0.464).
BRAF V600E (n=2272): interaction encor x cetux = 0.323 (p=0.323).
MSI-H (n=2513): interaction pembro x stage_iv = -0.186 (p=0.442).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a global multivariable OLS for pfs_months including ECOG, stage, age, albumin, LDH, sex, sidedness, and all six treatment indicators with biomarker interactions, the canonical interactions (pembro*MSI-H +; encor*BRAF +; tras_tuc*HER2 +; cetux*KRAS −) all retain their expected signs.

analyses.result_summary: Global model: treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high coef=0.044 (p=0.396).
Global model: treatment_encorafenib:braf_v600e coef=-0.043 (p=0.503).
Global model: treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib:her2_amplified coef=0.000 (p=0.997).
Global model: treatment_cetuximab:kras_mutation coef=0.020 (p=0.269).
Global model: treatment_bevacizumab coef=0.006 (p=0.503).
Global model: treatment_regorafenib coef=0.939 (p=0).
